title: Indie Web Notes
description: Short notes on the independent web

items.title: A Practical Guide to Webmentions
items.content_html:
Webmentions are the indie web's answer to social media interactions. Here's how to implement them on your own site.

Step 1: Add a <link rel="webmention"> to your HTML head.
items.content_text:
Webmentions are the indie web's answer to social media interactions. Here's how to implement them on your own site.

Step 1: Add a <link rel="webmention"> to your HTML head.
items.summary: A practical guide to implementing Webmentions on your personal site.

items.title: Own Your Data
items.content_html: Every post you write on social media is a gift to a corporation. Build your own site instead.

items.title: RSS Is Not Dead
items.content_text: RSS is thriving in the shadows. Newsletters are just RSS with extra steps and a middleman.
